creator: bf2006a@yahoo.com
text:
FreeBSD Port Maintainers:

An update to math/gsl has been proposed, which will require at least minor
changes in a port that you maintain, due to a shared library version number
change.  Please see:

http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=129726


Regards (and Happy Holidays!),
                                 b.
